sys_update_xml.name: sp_widget_6d6edb09c31d8b1868b2f54d050131bf
sys_update_xml.payload:
customc/* ========================================= PAGE ========================================= */ .celebration-banner { background: linear-gradient( 135deg, #ff9800, #ffb74d ); color: #fff; text-align: center; padding: 30px; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 30px; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.12); } .banner-title { font-size: 34px; font-weight: 700; } .banner-subtitle { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 16px; opacity: .95; } /* ========================================= SECTION HEADER ========================================= */ .section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin: 25px 0 15px; } .section-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f2937; } .section-count { background: #ff9800; color: #fff; border-radius: 50px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin-right: 10px; } .view-all-btn { color: #0f62fe; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .view-all-btn:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* ========================================= GRID ========================================= */ .employee-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; } /* ========================================= CARD ========================================= */ .employee-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.05); transition: .25s ease; } .employee-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.12); } /* ========================================= CARD TOP ========================================= */ .employee-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } /* ========================================= PHOTO ========================================= */ .employee-photo { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid #ff9800; } .employee-avatar { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ff9800; color: #fff; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; line-height: 70px; flex-shrink: 0; } /* ========================================= INFO ========================================= */ .employee-info { flex: 1; } .employee-name { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 2px; } .employee-title { color: #6b7280; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .employee-department, .employee-location { color: #4b5563; font-size: 13px; line-height: 20px; } /* ========================================= FOOTER ========================================= */ .employee-footer { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } /* ========================================= BADGES ========================================= */ .birthday-badge { display: inline-block; background: #fff3e0; color: #ef6c00; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .anniversary-badge { display: inline-block; background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .employee-years { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: #6b7280; } /* ========================================= BUTTONS ========================================= */ .wish-btn { background: #ff9800; border: none; color: #fff; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .wish-btn:hover { background: #f57c00; } .congrats-btn { background: #2e7d32; border: none; color: #fff; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .congrats-btn:hover { background: #1b5e20; } /* ========================================= VIEW MORE ========================================= */ .show-more { text-align: center; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 35px; } .show-more a { color: #0f62fe; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .show-more a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* ========================================= EMPTY STATE ========================================= */ .empty-state { background: #ffffff; padding: 30px; text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px dashed #d1d5db; color: #6b7280; } /* ========================================= MOBILE ========================================= */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .employee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .employee-header { align-items: flex-start; } .employee-footer { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; } .wish-btn, .congrats-btn { width: 100%; } .section-header h2 { font-size: 24px; } .banner-title { font-size: 28px; } }sp_instancetruebirthday_hero_bannerfalseBirthday Hero Banner{ "view_type":"carousel", "show_age":true, "show_anniversary":true, "show_location":true, "show_department":true, "show_years_service":true }falsefalsesp_widgetadmin2026-06-04 11:16:496d6edb09c31d8b1868b2f54d050131bf38Birthday Hero Bannerglobalglobalsp_widget_6d6edb09c31d8b1868b2f54d050131bfadmin2026-06-07 09:22:246d6edb09c31d8b1868b2f54d050131bfadmin2026-06-04 11:16:48ff7e5749c31d8b1868b2f54d0501310e0admin2026-06-04 11:16:48sp_widget

sys_update_xml.name: sp_widget_761f1a8ac315cb5868b2f54d05013141
sys_update_xml.payload:
customc/* ========================================= PAGE ========================================= */ .wall-header{ text-align:center; margin-bottom:30px; } .wall-header h1{ font-size:38px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:10px; } .wall-header p{ color:#6b7280; font-size:16px; } .section-title{ font-size:28px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:20px; } .celebration-banner { background: linear-gradient( 135deg, #ff9800, #ffb74d ); color: #fff; text-align: center; padding: 30px; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 30px; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.12); } .banner-title { font-size: 34px; font-weight: 700; } .banner-subtitle { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 16px; opacity: .95; } /* ========================================= SECTION HEADER ========================================= */ .section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin: 25px 0 15px; } .section-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f2937; } .section-count { background: #ff9800; color: #fff; border-radius: 50px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin-right: 10px; } .view-all-btn { color: #0f62fe; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .view-all-btn:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* ========================================= GRID ========================================= */ .employee-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; } /* ========================================= CARD ========================================= */ .employee-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.05); transition: .25s ease; } .employee-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.12); } /* ========================================= CARD TOP ========================================= */ .employee-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } /* ========================================= PHOTO ========================================= */ .employee-photo { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid #ff9800; } .employee-avatar { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ff9800; color: #fff; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; line-height: 70px; flex-shrink: 0; } /* ========================================= INFO ========================================= */ .employee-info { flex: 1; } .employee-name { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 2px; } .employee-title { color: #6b7280; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .employee-department, .employee-location { color: #4b5563; font-size: 13px; line-height: 20px; } /* ========================================= FOOTER ========================================= */ .employee-footer { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } /* ========================================= BADGES ========================================= */ .birthday-badge { display: inline-block; background: #fff3e0; color: #ef6c00; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .anniversary-badge { display: inline-block; background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .employee-years { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: #6b7280; } /* ========================================= BUTTONS ========================================= */ .wish-btn { background: #ff9800; border: none; color: #fff; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .wish-btn:hover { background: #f57c00; } .congrats-btn { background: #2e7d32; border: none; color: #fff; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .congrats-btn:hover { background: #1b5e20; } /* ========================================= VIEW MORE ========================================= */ .show-more { text-align: center; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 35px; } .show-more a { color: #0f62fe; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .show-more a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* ========================================= EMPTY STATE ========================================= */ .empty-state { background: #ffffff; padding: 30px; text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px dashed #d1d5db; color: #6b7280; } /* ========================================= MOBILE ========================================= */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .employee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .employee-header { align-items: flex-start; } .employee-footer { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; } .wish-btn, .congrats-btn { width: 100%; } .section-header h2 { font-size: 24px; } .banner-title { font-size: 28px; } }sp_instancefalsefalseBirthday Wall Widgetfalsefalsesp_widgetadmin2026-06-07 09:15:13761f1a8ac315cb5868b2f54d050131411Birthday Wall Widgetglobalglobalsp_widget_761f1a8ac315cb5868b2f54d05013141admin2026-06-07 09:39:57761f1a8ac315cb5868b2f54d05013141admin2026-06-07 09:15:11ab6f124ac355cb5868b2f54d050131df0admin2026-06-07 09:15:11sp_widget
true
